projectDescription: Cross-platform game hack for Counter-Strike 2 with Panorama-based GUI
keyFeatures: Player Info In World - Display player position, health, weapon, and status through walls
Outline Glow - Customizable outline glow for players, weapons, grenades, bomb, and hostages
Model Glow - Apply glowing effects to player models, weapons, grenades, and objectives
Sound Visualization - Visual indicators for footsteps, bomb plant/defuse, weapon sounds
Bomb Timer - Display bomb countdown, defuse progress, and plant alerts
Killfeed Preserver - Keep your kills visible in the killfeed throughout the round
No Scope Inaccuracy Visualization - Visual feedback for sniper rifle accuracy without scope
Viewmodel Modification - Customize weapon viewmodel FOV
Panorama-based GUI - Native-looking interface integrated into the game's UI system
Cross-platform Support - Works on both Windows and Linux
publicApiSurface: Combat Features: No Scope Inaccuracy Visualization for sniper rifles
HUD Features: Bomb Timer, Defusing Alert, Bomb Plant Alert, Killfeed Preserver, Post-round Timer
Visual Features: Player Info In World, Outline Glow (players, weapons, grenades, bomb, hostages), Model Glow, Viewmodel FOV modification
Sound Features: Footstep Visualization, Bomb Plant/Beep/Defuse Visualization, Weapon Scope/Reload Sound Visualization
Config System: ConfigVariable, ConfigToString, ConfigFromString, ConfigFileOperation
GUI Components: PanoramaGUI with tabbed interface (Combat, HUD, Visuals, Sound tabs)
Memory Patterns: Windows and Linux pattern scanning for game structures
Platform API: WindowsPlatformApiImpl, LinuxPlatformApiImpl for OS-specific functionality
